# Read input
N = int(input())
A = list(map(int, input().split()))

# Calculate the total number of moves
total_moves = sum(A)

# Determine the winner based on whether the total number of moves is odd or even
if total_moves % 2 == 1:
    print("Fennec")
else:
    print("Snuke")
